pull_request.title: Fix minor correctness issues
pull_request.body:
- Fix .iteritems() → .items() in vim_helper.py escape(). This is a latent Python 2 crash when a dict is passed.
- Update mypy.ini python_version from 3.7 to 3.11 to match pyproject.toml requires-python.
- Replace bare except: clauses with specific exception types
- Add comment to Vim version check noting CI tests 9.1+ while keeping the 8.0 guard for older installs.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Global options:
 
 [mypy]
-python_version = 3.7
+python_version = 3.11
 warn_return_any = True
 warn_unused_configs = True
 mypy_path=pythonx/UltiSnips

@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ if exists('did_plugin_ultisnips') || &cp
 endif
 let did_plugin_ultisnips=1
 
+" CI tests against Vim 9.1+, but older versions down to 8.0 may still work.
 if version < 800
    echohl WarningMsg
    echom  "UltiSnips requires Vim >= 8.0"

@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ def _pm(self, tb):
         """
         try:
             self._pdb.interaction(None, tb)
-        except:  # Ignore all exceptions part of debugger shutdown (and bugs... https://bugs.python.org/issue44461 )
+        except Exception:  # Ignore exceptions from debugger shutdown (and bugs... https://bugs.python.org/issue44461 )
             pass
 
     def set_trace(self, frame):

@@ -283,7 +283,7 @@ def _parse(self, stream, indent):
                 if not result:
                     continue
                 choice_list.append(self._get_unescaped_choice_item(result))
-            except:
+            except StopIteration:
                 last_choice_item = self._get_unescaped_choice_item(
                     choices_text[cur_col:]
                 )

@@ -105,7 +105,7 @@ def conv(obj):
                 + ",".join(
                     [
                         "%s:%s" % (conv(key), conv(value))
-                        for key, value in obj.iteritems()
+                        for key, value in obj.items()
                     ]
                 )
                 + "}"
@@ -269,7 +269,7 @@ def get_cursor_pos():
 def delete_mark(name):
     try:
         return command("delma " + name)
-    except:
+    except error:
         return False
 
 
@@ -349,7 +349,7 @@ def _unmap_select_mode_mapping():
                 # Actually unmap it
                 try:
                     command("silent! sunmap %s %s" % (option, trig))
-                except:  # pylint:disable=bare-except
+                except error:
                     # Bug 908139: ignore unmaps that fail because of
                     # unprintable characters. This is not ideal because we
                     # will not be able to unmap lhs with any unprintable

commit_summaries.message:
Fix correctness issues: iteritems, bare excepts, mypy version

- Fix .iteritems() → .items() in vim_helper.py (Python 2 crash)
- Replace bare except: clauses with specific exception types in
  vim_helper.py, lexer.py, and remote_pdb.py
- Update mypy.ini python_version from 3.7 to 3.11
- Add comment to Vim version check noting CI tests 9.1+
